message:
fix(sync): move process_returns after waiter cleanup in pool acquire drop

Move pool.process_returns() call from before waiter cleanup to after in
the AcquireFuture Drop impl. Processing returns before removing the
waiter from the queue could cause a returned resource to be assigned to
the waiter being dropped, leaking the resource. By processing returns
after waiter cleanup, returned resources are only assigned to still-
active waiters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
